hero.description: Get premium-quality grooming at budget-friendly prices. We prioritize your pet’s safety and comfort while delivering a stylish, fresh look every time.

basicGrooming.name: Basic Grooming
basicGrooming.desc: Includes: nail clipping, ear cleaning, paw trimming, private part trimming, shampoo/conditioning and drying.

fullGrooming.name: Full Grooming
fullGrooming.desc: Everything provided in basic grooming PLUS hair trimming and styling.

earCleaning.name: Ear Cleaning
earCleaning.desc: Remove wax and debris, help prevent infections and odor, and keep your dog’s ears healthy and comfortable.

dematting.name: Dematting
dematting.desc: Remove mats and knots. Keeps your dog’s coat smooth, healthy, and easy to maintain.

bath.name: Bath & Brush
bath.desc: Gentle bath and thorough brush-out to clean your dog’s coat, remove loose fur, and leave them soft, fresh, and comfortable.

nailTrimming.name: Nail Trimming
nailTrimming.desc: Quick nail trimming and filing, preventing overgrowth, splitting, and discomfort.

bath.name: Bath & Brush
bath.desc: Calm bath and brush-out for your cat to remove dirt and loose fur, reduce shedding, and keep the coat soft and healthy.

bathLong.name: Bath & Brush - Long Hair
bathLong.desc: Calm bath and brush-out for your cat to remove dirt and loose fur, reduce shedding, and keep the coat soft and healthy.

hairTrimming.name: Hair Trimming
hairTrimming.desc: Precise, gentle trim to tidy your cat’s coat, reduce matting, and keep them comfortable.

footer.rights: RW Pet Grooming. All rights reserved.

errorPage.title: Booking Error
errorPage.message: We couldn't complete your booking at this time. This might be due to a temporary issue or the selected time slot may no longer be available.
